title: Cherries, The Forbidden Fruit
description: Adds a new fruit, which can be used for many things!
body:
# Cherries, The Forbidden Fruit:

Ever wanted to get Cherries from Cherry Trees, make Cherry Pies, or Potions of Nausea?

Well, now you can with Cherries, a new fruity addition!

**Cherries:**

A new fruit that has a 25% chance to drop from Cherry Leaves when broken.

Eating one gives 1 point of hunger, or 0.5 hunger shanks.

Since Cherries in real life have poisonous pits, if you eat five of them, you have a 25% chance to get the Poison effect for 5 seconds.

Can be used to make Golden Cherries and Cherry Pies.

**Golden Cherries:**

A golden variant of Cherries that have a 1% chance to drop from Cherry Leaves when broken.

Can also be made in a Crafting Table by surrounding 1 Cherries with 8 Golden Nuggets.

Eating one gives 4 point of hunger, or 2 hunger shanks.

If you eat five of them, you have a 10% chance to get the Nausea effect for 5 seconds.

Can be brewed in a Brewing Stand to make Potions of Nausea.

Can be used to make Golden Cherry Pies.

**Cherry Pie:**

Made in a Crafting Table with 1 Cherries, 1 Egg, 1 Sugar, and 1 Wheat.

They are placeable like a Cake, but it only has 4 slices, and each slice only gives 1 point of hunger, or 0.5 hunger shanks.

**Golden Cherry Pie:**

Made like Cherry Pies, but the Cherries are replaced with 1 Golden Cherries.

Like a Cherry Pie, it only has 4 slices, but each slice gives 3 points of hunger, or 1.5 shanks.

# Other:

**Mod Packs:**

If you want to use this mod in a Mod Pack, you can, as long as you give me credit.
